author: 0xunclebill
content: We can’t process a payload before the block. Right now I’m working on adding a reprocess queue for payloads that arrive before blocks so that we can process them once the block arrives

author: 0xunclebill
content: but yeah this sounds like a LH bug, thanks for flagging

author: 0xunclebill
content: At the moment we are purposely publishing the payload like a second after the block to try and prevent this from happening lol

author: potuz
content: I actually imagined this was why <@412614104222531604> didn't see any split in LH. Thanks for letting me know. I'll continue testing then only with Prysm against these types of reorgs

author: stefanbratanov
content: That could explain why Teku may not be working as well, we send payload pretty fast after the block

author: stefanbratanov
content: We should do reprocess queue as well

author: potuz
content: we've learned this from our previous interop, I didn't even try against another client before merging this

author: potuz
content: FWIW, I think we're broken today if we get a block for which we haven't seen the payload. We do have the path to request it but it's not merged yet I think.
